codeReview.summary: The foundation-store feature is fully implemented and well-tested. The Store module provides all required functionality: init(path) for creating .werk/sd.db, open() for directory discovery with fallback, new_in_memory() for testing, and complete CRUD operations with mutation logging. All 37 tests pass and cover the expected behavior comprehensively.

issues.description: The discover_werk_dir() function (used by Store::open()) is not directly tested. Tests use Store::init() or Store::new_in_memory() exclusively. While the concurrent_reads test indirectly exercises Store::init() with a path, there is no test verifying the upward directory walk or ~/.werk/ fallback behavior of Store::open().

summary: Review complete. The foundation-store implementation passes scrutiny with one non-blocking observation about test coverage for directory discovery. All core functionality is present, tested, and follows project conventions.
